---
title: "MIS Effort Kids"
author: "Kayley Dotson"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(haven)
library(afex)
library(car)
library(stats)
library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(emmeans)
library(ppcor)
library(psych)
library(tidyr)
library(janitor)
library(kableExtra)
library(reshape2)
library(vtable)
library(summarytools)
library(knitr)
library(flextable)
library(officer)
library(binom)
```

```{r load data, include=FALSE}
setwd('/Users/kayleydotson/')
MIS_effort_kids <- read.csv("MIS_effort_kids.csv")
```

```{r}
colnames(MIS_effort_kids)[12] ="effort"
```

For all conducted analyses, scores were standardized so that a positive value indicates a preference for effort, a negative value indicates a preference for value, and a 0 value indicates no preference. 

```{r}
MIS_effort_sum_table <- st(MIS_effort_kids,
                     vars = c('recipient_like_giver', 'giver_you_like_more', 'friend', 'effort', 'recipient_like_gift', 'appreciate', 'gift_you_like_more', 'recipient_gift', 'you_gift'))
```

```{r}
MIS_effort_kids_renamed <- MIS_effort_kids %>%
  dplyr::select(
    "Recipient liking of giver" = recipient_like_giver,
    "Child liking of giver" = giver_you_like_more,
    "Recipient better friend" = friend,
    "Effort" = effort,
    "Recipient liking of gift" = recipient_like_gift,
    "Recipient appreciation" = appreciate,
    "Child liking of gift" = gift_you_like_more,
    "Recipient gift" = recipient_gift,
    "Child gift" = you_gift
  )

summary_table <- describe(MIS_effort_kids_renamed)[c("mean", "sd")] %>%
  round(2) %>%
  as.data.frame()

summary_table$Variable <- rownames(summary_table)
summary_table <- summary_table[, c("Variable", "mean", "sd")]
rownames(summary_table) <- NULL

kable(summary_table, col.names = c("Variable", "M", "SD"), align = "lcc", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, position = "left")
```

```{r}
apa_flextable <- flextable(summary_table) %>%
  set_header_labels(Variable = "Variable", mean = "M", sd = "SD") %>%
  align(align = "center", part = "all") %>%
  autofit() %>%
  theme_booktabs()

doc <- read_docx() %>%
  body_add_par("Table 1", style = "Normal") %>%
  body_add_par("Descriptive statistics for main variables", style = "Normal") %>%
  body_add_flextable(apa_flextable)

##print(doc, target = "MIS_APA_Table.docx")
```

```{r}
t.test(MIS_effort_kids$recipient_like_giver)
```

```{r}
t.test(MIS_effort_kids$friend)
```

```{r}
t.test(MIS_effort_kids$gift_you_like_more)
```

```{r}
t.test(MIS_effort_kids$recipient_like_gift)
```

```{r}
t.test(MIS_effort_kids$appreciate)
```

```{r}
binom.test(sum(MIS_effort_kids$recipient_gift == 1), n = nrow(MIS_effort_kids), p = 0.5)
```

```{r}
binom.test(sum(MIS_effort_kids$you_gift == 1), n = nrow(MIS_effort_kids), p = 0.5)
```

```{r}
n_success <- sum(MIS_effort_kids$recipient_gift == 1)
n_total <- nrow(MIS_effort_kids)
prop_success <- n_success / n_total
ci <- binom.confint(n_success, n_total, method = "wilson")

ggplot() +
  geom_col(aes(x = "Reciprocity", y = prop_success), fill = "#4682B4", width = 0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(x = "Reciprocity", ymin = ci$lower, ymax = ci$upper), width = 0.1) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Proportion Choosing High-Effort Giver",
    title = "Reciprocity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), axis.ticks.x = element_blank())
```

```{r}
table(MIS_effort_kids$appreciate)
```

```{r}
df <- data.frame(Gift_Preferred = c("Valuable Gift", "No Preference", "Effortful Gift"), 
                 Count = c(6, 5, 15))

df$Gift_Preferred <- factor(df$Gift_Preferred, 
                            levels = c("Valuable Gift", "No Preference", "Effortful Gift"))

ggplot(data = df, aes(x = Gift_Preferred, y = Count, fill = Gift_Preferred)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#D3D3D3", "#FFCB05", "#00274C")) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 24)) +
  labs(title = "Objective Value vs. Effort in Kids",
       x = "Preferred Gift") +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = gender, y = appreciate, fill = gender)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Appreciation by Gender", x = "Gender", y = "Appreciation")
```

```{r}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = gender, y = friend, fill = gender)) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Better friend by Gender", x = "Gender", y = "Liking")
```

```{r}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = as.factor(age), y = appreciate, fill = as.factor(age))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Appreciation by Age", x = "Age", y = "Appreciation")
```


```{r}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = as.factor(age), y = friend, fill = as.factor(age))) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Who is a better friend? by Age", x = "Age", y = "Who is a better friend?")
```

```{r}
stacked_data <- MIS_effort_kids %>%
  group_by(age, recipient_gift) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(stacked_data, aes(x = as.factor(age), y = count, fill = as.factor(recipient_gift))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Reciprocity Distribution by Age",
       x = "Age",
       y = "Proportion")
```

```{r}
stacked_data2 <- MIS_effort_kids %>%
  group_by(gender, recipient_gift) %>%
  dplyr::summarize(count = n(), .groups = "drop")

ggplot(stacked_data2, aes(x = as.factor(gender), y = count, fill = as.factor(recipient_gift))) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "fill") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Reciprocity Distribution by Gender",
       x = "Gender",
       y = "Proportion")
```

There do not appear to be any strong age or gender trends. 

```{r}
correlation_data2 <- MIS_effort_kids[, c("like_high", "like_low", "recipient_like_giver", "giver_you_like_more", "friend", "effort", "recipient_like_gift", "appreciate", "gift_you_like_more", "recipient_gift", "you_gift")]

correlation_matrix2 <- cor(correlation_data2, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

rounded_correlation_matrix2 <- round(correlation_matrix2, 2)

rounded_correlation_matrix2 %>%
  kbl(caption = "Correlation Table") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE, bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
```

```{r}
correlation_melt2 <- melt(correlation_matrix2)

ggplot(correlation_melt2, aes(Var1, Var2, fill = value)) +
  geom_tile() +
  scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  labs(title = "Correlation Heatmap", fill = "Correlation")
```

```{r}
scale_like2 <- MIS_effort_kids [, c("recipient_like_gift","gift_you_like_more")]
alpha_like2 <- alpha(scale_like2)
print(alpha_like2)
```

```{r comp2}
MIS_effort_kids$gift_scale <- rowMeans(MIS_effort_kids[,c('recipient_like_gift','gift_you_like_more')])
```

```{r}
t.test(MIS_effort_kids$gift_scale)
```

## Graph for SRCD 2025

```{r}
srcd_df <- data.frame(
  Group = rep(c("Adults", "Children"), each = 3),
  Gift_Preferred = rep(c("Valuable Gift", "No Preference", "Effortful Gift"), times = 2),
  Proportion = c(0.09, 0.14, 0.77,   # Adults
                 0.23, 0.19, 0.58)       # Children
)

srcd_df$Gift_Preferred <- factor(srcd_df$Gift_Preferred,
                            levels = c("Valuable Gift", "No Preference", "Effortful Gift"))

ggplot(srcd_df, aes(x = Gift_Preferred, y = Proportion, fill = Gift_Preferred)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~Group) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#00274C", "#D3D3D3", "#FFCB05")) +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Preferred Gift Type by Group",
       x = "Preferred Gift",
       y = "Proportion") +
  guides(fill = "none")
```

```{r}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = as.factor(age), y = recipient_like_giver, fill = as.factor(age))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, fill = "#E07A5F") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Recipient liking of giver by Age", x = "Age", y = "Recipient liking of giver") 
```


```{R}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = as.factor(age), y = recipient_like_gift, fill = as.factor(age))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, fill = "#E07A5F") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Recipient liking of gift by Age", x = "Age", y = "Recipient liking of gift") 
```

```{R}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = as.factor(age), y = friend, fill = as.factor(age))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, fill = "#E07A5F") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Who is a better friend? by Age", x = "Age", y = "Who is a better friend?") 
```

```{R}
ggplot(MIS_effort_kids, aes(x = as.factor(age), y = appreciate, fill = as.factor(age))) +
  geom_violin(trim = FALSE, fill = "#E07A5F") +
  stat_summary(fun = median, geom = "point", shape = 23, size = 3, fill = "white") +
  theme_bw() +
  labs(title = "Appreciation by Age", x = "Age", y = "Appreciation") 
```
